title: In Bodoland, fight for peace, identity ‘unites’ political rivals BPF and UPPL
description: In the Bodoland Territorial Region, BPF in alliance with the BJP is taking on the UPPL, which till a few months ago was with the saffron party; while the UPPL blames the BPF for communal tension in the region, both concur on the need to protect the Bodo identity and have lasting peace
